title: angelica archangelica subsp. himalaica
intro: Angelica archangelica subsp. himalaica, also known as Himalayan angelica or Himalayan ginseng, is a subspecies of the angelica plant, which is a perennial herb native to the Himalayan region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, which have been used to treat a range of health issues. The health benefits of Himalayan angelica include reducing stress and anxiety, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Himalayan angelica is typically used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and capsules, and is also used in traditional medicine practices.
